item.description:
What's new in 0.1.34

  • New on Stats: By time of day. A 24-hour chart of when your Mac is actually being held awake, with your busiest hour called out. Long sessions are split across every hour they cover, so an overnight render shows up across the whole night.
  • You can now choose what goes on a shared card. Under Include, pick any of Highlights, What kept me up, By day, By time of day, and All time (hours since install, current streak, top trigger and longest ever).
  • Square Posts and Stories have limited room, so the Include options grey out once the format is full - the card never quietly clips a section you asked for.
